title: Flow Control
description: Show, For, Switch, and ErrorBoundary control which components run based on reactive conditions.
show_intro: Show renders its children only when the when condition is truthy. It can also provide a fallback.
show_callback_intro: You can access the truthy value with a callback child:
for_intro: For iterates over a reactive list. Each item is keyed by reference. When the list changes, only affected items update.
error_boundary_intro: ErrorBoundary catches errors thrown in child components:
info_accessor_conditions: Flow components take accessor functions (() => value) for conditions. The condition re-evaluates without re-running the parent component.
